---
title: ""
---

<div class="section-box">

# Hi, I’m Sara

I’m an MPH student in Global Epidemiology and Data Science at Emory University.

I’m interested in using data, digital health tools, and epidemiologic methods to improve healthcare systems and outcomes.

</div>

<div class="section-box">

## What I Do

- Data analysis (R, Python, SQL)
- Epidemiologic research
- Digital health and health tech
- Healthcare analytics

</div>
